03],[299,517,1776529824514],[311,519,1776529824528],[322,519,1776529824540],[331,520,1776529824554],[338,521,1776529824570],[343,521,1776529824584],[346,522,1776529824599],[348,522,1776529824618],[349,522,1776529824637],[350,522,1776529824644],[351,522,1776529824674],[351,523,1776529824692],[352,523,1776529824714],[352,524,1776529824733],[353,524,1776529824746],[354,525,1776529824767],[356,526,1776529824777],[357,526,1776529824795],[358,526,1776529824807],[358,525,1776529824820],[359,525,1776529824824],[360,525,1776529824841],[361,525,1776529824847],[362,525,1776529824861],[363,524,1776529824875],[364,524,1776529824897],[365,523,1776529824923],[365,522,1776529824940],[366,522,1776529824953],[367,521,1776529824970],[368,520,1776529824997],[369,520,1776529825002],[370,519,1776529825013],[371,519,1776529825037],[372,518,1776529825043]],"mm-mp":20.09847596717468,"md":[[354,523,1776529824760]],"md-mp":3772.75,"mu":[[354,523,1776529824930]],"mu-mp":3799.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
